title: HC Wainwright Has Lowered Expectations for SoundHound AI (NASDAQ:SOUN) Stock Price
description: SoundHound AI (NASDAQ:SOUN – Get Free Report) had its price target dropped by investment analysts at HC Wainwright from $26.00 to $20.00 in a research note issued to investors on Monday,Benzinga reports. title: Derry’s Optik AI receives £600k as part of £1.8m cash injection for tech start ups
description: A Derry-based software firm is to share in a £1.8m cash injection from the Department for the Economy to help technology start-ups to accelerate growth.
